title: buildah microdnf trouble (docker build is fine, podman build too)
body:
**Description**
Dockerfile
```
FROM registry.redhat.io/ubi8/ubi-minimal
RUN microdnf install -y java-11-openjdk-headless
```
buildah version 1.14.0 (image-spec 1.0.1-dev, runtime-spec 1.0.1-dev) does not create image. 

docker build works fine
microdnf install in podman run -ti registry.redhat.io/ubi8/ubi-minimal works fine 
podman build works fine 

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. buildah from registry.redhat.io/ubi8/ubi-minimal
2. buildah run ubi8-minimal-working-container -- microdnf install -y java-11-openjdk-headless

**Describe the results you received:**
using 
buildah run ubi8-minimal-working-container -- microdnf install -y java-11-openjdk-headless
```
Installing: java-11-openjdk-headless;1:11.0.6.10-0.el8_1;x86_64;ubi-8-appstream
Installing: (null)
Installing: (null)
error: Error -1 running transaction
ERRO exit status 1
```
or 
using buildah bud 
```
Installing: java-11-openjdk-headless;1:11.0.6.10-0.el8_1;x86_64;ubi-8-appstream                                                          
Installing: (null)                                                                                                                       
Installing: (null)            
error: Error -1 running transaction                     
error building at STEP "RUN microdnf install -y java-11-openjdk-headless shadow-utils": error while running runtime: exit status 1       
ERRO exit status 1
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
```
Installing: java-11-openjdk-headless;1:11.0.6.10-0.el8_1;x86_64;ubi-8-appstream                                                                                                                                                                                                   
Installing: (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
Installing: (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
Complete.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
[root@8b70004d442e /]# echo $?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
0
```
**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

```
buildah-1.14.0-2.fc31.x86_64
```

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
buildah version 1.14.0 (image-spec 1.0.1-dev, runtime-spec 1.0.1-dev)
```

**Output of `podman version` if reporting a `podman build` issue:**
Is podman build issue, if it works ? 
```
Version:            1.8.0
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.13.6
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
NAME=Fedora
VERSION="31.20200307.0 (Workstation Edition)"
ID=fedora
VERSION_ID=31
VERSION_CODENAME=""
PLATFORM_ID="platform:f31"
PRETTY_NAME="Fedora 31.20200307.0 (Workstation Edition)"
ANSI_COLOR="0;34"
LOGO=fedora-logo-icon
CPE_NAME="cpe:/o:fedoraproject:fedora:31"
HOME_URL="https://fedoraproject.org/"
DOCUMENTATION_URL="https://docs.fedoraproject.org/en-US/fedora/f31/system-administrators-guide/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Communicating_and_getting_help"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugzilla.redhat.com/"
REDHAT_BUGZILLA_PRODUCT="Fedora"
REDHAT_BUGZILLA_PRODUCT_VERSION=31
REDHAT_SUPPORT_PRODUCT="Fedora"
REDHAT_SUPPORT_PRODUCT_VERSION=31
PRIVACY_POLICY_URL="https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Legal:PrivacyPolicy"
VARIANT="Workstation Edition"
VARIANT_ID=workstation
OSTREE_VERSION='31.20200307.0'
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux  5.5.7-200.fc31.x86_64 #1 SMP Fri Feb 28 17:18:37 UTC 2020 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

comments.body: @W73 do you still have this issue?  I believe this should work now with latest buildah?
